use_cases: Switching between different content sections within a page or view
Navigating through settings, profiles, or account sections
Organizing related content into browsable categories with icons
Creating tabbed interfaces for product details or feature showcases
Building dashboard navigation with animated tab transitions
ai_summary: A hybrid tabs component combining icon and text labels with glass-morphism styling using backdrop blur effects. Supports animated tab switching via framer-motion with active state highlighting. Features a flexible item-based configuration for creating navigation patterns like sidebars, settings panels, or content switchers. The glass-effect styling with rounded borders and semi-transparent backgrounds creates a modern, layered aesthetic suitable for dashboard and settings interfaces.
